title: Nerv 1st Branch
wikitext:
'''Nerv 1st Branch''' or Nerv-01 is located in Massachusetts, [[United States of America|USA]].  It is where [[Evangelion Unit-03]] was created.  The "Magi 04" set of supercomputers is probably located at or near Nerv-01 (possibly as part of the MIT campus).  

{{stub}}
html:
Nerv 1st Branch or Nerv-01 is located in Massachusetts, USA. It is where Evangelion Unit-03 was created. The "Magi 04" set of supercomputers is probably located at or near Nerv-01 (possibly as part of the MIT campus).


This article bears the unpleasant designation of "Stub." This is a Bad Thing. Provide a great service to NGE fan-geeks everywhere by making it awesomer!

chunks.content:
Article: Nerv 1st Branch
Nerv 1st Branch or Nerv-01 is located in Massachusetts, USA.  It is where Evangelion Unit-03 was created.  The "Magi 04" set of supercomputers is probably located at or near Nerv-01 (possibly as part of the MIT campus).
